qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of this page?
qa_pairs.answer: This page is intended to record changes to job scheduling policies that might affect the behaviour of job submission commands such as sbatch, salloc, and srun.

qa_pairs.question: When were the RAC 2026 accounts activated on the fir, nibi, narval, and rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts were activated on fir and nibi on 2026-04-06, and on narval and rorqual on 2026-04-07.

qa_pairs.question: What is the new policy regarding specifying GPU models for job requests?
qa_pairs.answer: All GPU requests must now specify a GPU or Multi-Instance GPU (instance) model. This policy was implemented on fir and nibi on 2026-04-06, and on rorqual on 2026-04-17; it is not yet done for narval.
